infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Slot App needs camera access to take photos for service requests and AR beauty try-on.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Slot App needs microphone access for voice search and video consultations.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Slot App needs your location to find nearby professionals and show accurate service areas.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Slot App uses location to track your professional in real-time during a service.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Slot App needs access to your photos to upload service request images.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Slot App needs permission to save AR previews and service photos to your gallery.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Use Face ID to quickly sign in to Slot App.
